imageUrl.title: Image URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the thumbnail image to analyze

youtubeUrl.title: YouTube Video URL
youtubeUrl.description: YouTube video URL to extract thumbnail from (alternative to imageUrl)

imagePath.title: Local Image Path
imagePath.description: Local filesystem path to the image (for internal/testing use)

variantCount.title: Number of Variants
variantCount.description: Number of optimized variants to generate (1-5)
